sealed_before: any S6 learning-ladder evaluation run (feature extraction and training-code authoring are not evaluations)
eval_pack: WSD_EVAL_v1.manifest.json (frozen @4d42948) - any drift = new pack version, results non-comparable

W2-B1_classical_beats_detector.metric: per-handle F1 of GBDT (and logistic reported) vs detector v1 F1, threshold 0.5, on held-out drawings (deterministic 70/30 split by drawing id, seed 7) per tier F and M; S reported (detector already 1.0/1.0)
W2-B1_classical_beats_detector.pass: GBDT F1 >= detector F1 on the same held-out drawings for BOTH F and M tiers
W2-B1_classical_beats_detector.note: ladder rule G3: a rung must beat the rung below on the frozen pack to earn its place

W2-B2_nameblind_gap.metric: full-features GBDT F1 minus name-blind GBDT F1 (layer feature removed) on the same held-out split
W2-B2_nameblind_gap.note: REPORT_ONLY - measures how much of the learned skill is reading names vs geometry (tautology risk); synth layers are generator-assigned so a large gap flags name leakage in the generator

W2-B3_anti_silver_control.metric: GBDT trained on label-permuted training data (seed 7), test ROC-AUC on true labels
W2-B3_anti_silver_control.note: sanity: pipeline must NOT extract signal from permuted labels; failure = leakage in features/split

W2-B4_pu_learning.metric: S6-2 PU (silver positives + unlabeled) evaluated against synth truth per-handle
W2-B4_pu_learning.note: REPORT_ONLY in W2 - exploratory; graduates to banded in W3 if promising

independence_audit: w2_independence_audit_v1.json recorded BEFORE these experiments; silver counts as ~2 independent families, not 5 judges
constraints: no fake PASS - failed bands reported as FAIL with evidence
name-blind twin arm mandatory on every learned model
compute: local only in W2 (no DGX, no paid APIs)
